items.name: Frayed Cap
items.description: A one-of-a-kind hat that embodies the essence of 90s fashion. This unique piece holds an exceptional value as it is a never-used prototype, adding to its rarity and appeal. The cap features a striking combination of black and denim, creating a stylish and versatile look. With its frayed edges and distressed detailing, it exudes a sense of effortless coolness and urban flair. This hat captures the spirit of the 90s, a decade known for its grunge, hip-hop, and streetwear influences. It is a coveted item for fashion enthusiasts and collectors seeking to embrace a nostalgic aesthetic.
